task: D22 branch registry + ancestry; D23 worktree registry
purpose: draft read-only, veridian-scoped git branch/worktree registry module
input-sensitivity: none (no secrets, no private paths sent)
fixes-over-draft: merged detection: draft used !!git(branch --merged) (true if ANY merged branch exists); replaced with a per-branch merged-set membership check + default-branch self-merge
ahead/behind: draft regex grabbed first two numbers ambiguously; replaced with explicit /ahead N/ + /behind N/ parsing of upstream:track
field separator: \x00 rejected by execFileSync (no null bytes in args) -> switched to \x1f unit separator
stderr: stdio ignore on stderr so swallowed git errors do not leak to console
worktree parse: flush-on-new-block + null-guard so detached/locked/prunable flags map correctly
